name: Define generic context interfaces (state/actions/meta)
description: HIGH: define a generic context contract `{ state, actions, meta }` so providers can dependency-inject different state implementations without changing UI subcomponents.

metadata.intent: Make composed UI dependency-injectable by standardizing context shape (state/actions/meta)

must_not: UI subcomponents tightly coupled to a specific state hook
conventions: Context value shape: `{ state, actions, meta }` to support non-visual dependencies like refs.

steps.description: Define `State` as pure serializable UI state (input, flags, items).
Define `Actions` as imperative verbs (update/submit/remove) with stable signatures.
Define `Meta` for non-state dependencies (refs, ids, callbacks not tied to state).
Ensure each provider implements the same contract, even if state backend differs (local, global store, server sync).
